committees.name: Education & Outreach Committee
committees.description: Oversees the society’s educational programs and outreach activities for students, educators, and the public.
committees.mission: To expand access to high-quality scientific education and foster public engagement with research.
committees.responsibilities: Design outreach initiatives, evaluate education grant proposals, coordinate with regional chapters, and develop teaching resources.

committees.name: Public Engagement Task Force
committees.description: Leads short-term projects to improve public understanding of science through events, media, and online campaigns.
committees.mission: To increase the visibility and impact of member research among non-specialist audiences.
committees.responsibilities: Organize public lectures, manage social media campaigns, collaborate with schools and community organizations.

committees.name: K–12 Curriculum Working Group
committees.description: Develops and curates curriculum materials aligned with national science standards for primary and secondary education.
committees.mission: To provide age-appropriate, evidence-based curriculum materials that highlight current research.
committees.responsibilities: Create lesson plans, review submitted materials, pilot resources with partner schools, and collect feedback.

committees.name: Online Learning Advisory Group
committees.description: Advises on the society’s webinars, online courses, and digital learning platforms.
committees.mission: To enhance the accessibility and effectiveness of virtual education offerings.
committees.responsibilities: Review proposals for new courses, recommend learning technologies, and assess user feedback and analytics.

committees.name: Education Policy Panel
committees.description: Monitors developments in science education policy and coordinates society responses.
committees.mission: To represent the society in discussions about science education policy and funding.
committees.responsibilities: Draft position statements, respond to calls for comment, and collaborate with the policy committee.

committees.name: Research Committee
committees.description: Provides strategic guidance on the society’s research priorities and grant programs.
committees.mission: To support high-impact research across all disciplines represented in the society.
committees.responsibilities: Set review criteria, recruit peer reviewers, and evaluate outcomes of funded projects.

committees.name: Policy & Advocacy Committee
committees.description: Coordinates advocacy on issues affecting research funding and scientific integrity.
committees.mission: To promote evidence-based policy and protect the interests of the scientific community.
committees.responsibilities: Develop advocacy campaigns, prepare policy briefs, and train members in science communication to policymakers.

committees.name: Membership Engagement Council
committees.description: Focuses on recruitment, retention, and member experience.
committees.mission: To build an engaged, diverse, and growing membership.
committees.responsibilities: Design member surveys, propose new benefits, and oversee onboarding initiatives.

committees.name: Diversity & Inclusion Commission
committees.description: Works to improve equity, diversity, and inclusion across all society activities.
committees.mission: To foster an inclusive culture that supports scientists from all backgrounds.
committees.responsibilities: Advise on inclusive practices, track demographic data, and recommend targeted programs.

committees.name: Awards Selection Committee
committees.description: Oversees selection of recipients for society prizes and honors.
committees.mission: To recognize outstanding contributions to research, education, and service.
committees.responsibilities: Review nominations, coordinate external reviews, and recommend awardees to the Board.

committees.name: Communications Editorial Board
committees.description: Guides content strategy for newsletters, blogs, and social media.
committees.mission: To share impactful stories about members’ work and society initiatives.
committees.responsibilities: Develop editorial calendars, review feature proposals, and maintain style guidelines.

committees.name: Early-Career Network Committee
committees.description: Represents the interests of early-career members and supports career development programming.
committees.mission: To provide a strong community and resources for early-career scientists.
committees.responsibilities: Plan networking events, coordinate mentoring schemes, and advise on early-career policies.

conferences.name: Annual Conference 2026
conferences.description: The society’s flagship annual meeting featuring plenary lectures, symposia, workshops, and networking events.

conferences.name: Annual Conference 2026 Virtual Extension
conferences.description: A virtual extension of the Annual Conference 2026 with select live-streamed and on-demand content.

job_postings.title: Postdoctoral Fellow in Machine Learning for Climate Impacts
job_postings.description: The Central European Climate Institute seeks a postdoctoral fellow to develop machine learning models for climate impact attribution and prediction.
job_postings.requirements: PhD in climate science, computer science, or related field; strong background in machine learning; experience with large-scale datasets.

job_postings.title: Postdoctoral Researcher in Bioinformatics
job_postings.description: Postdoctoral position focusing on integrative genomics and single-cell analysis in complex disease.
job_postings.requirements: PhD in bioinformatics, computational biology, or related discipline; proficiency in R or Python; experience with NGS data.

job_postings.title: Postdoctoral Fellow in Systems Neuroscience
job_postings.description: We invite applications for a postdoctoral fellow to study neural circuits underlying decision-making using multi-modal approaches.
job_postings.requirements: PhD in neuroscience or related field; experience with in vivo electrophysiology or imaging; strong quantitative skills.

job_postings.title: Postdoctoral Researcher in Quantum Biology
job_postings.description: A postdoctoral position to explore quantum effects in biological energy transfer processes.
job_postings.requirements: PhD in physics, chemistry, or biophysics; background in quantum mechanics and spectroscopy.

job_postings.title: Assistant Professor of Machine Learning in Health
job_postings.description: Tenure-track faculty position at the intersection of machine learning and clinical medicine.
job_postings.requirements: PhD, MD/PhD or equivalent; demonstrated record of scholarship; potential for independent funding.

job_postings.title: Senior Data Scientist (Remote)
job_postings.description: Lead data science projects using large-scale biomedical datasets in a fully remote role.
job_postings.requirements: MS or PhD in a quantitative field; 5+ years of data science experience; strong programming and communication skills.

job_postings.title: Science Policy Analyst
job_postings.description: Analyze and develop policy recommendations related to federal research funding.
job_postings.requirements: Advanced degree in science or public policy; strong analytical and writing skills.

job_postings.title: Postdoctoral Fellow in Computational Immunology
job_postings.description: Develop computational models to understand immune cell dynamics in infection and cancer.
job_postings.requirements: PhD in computational biology, immunology, or related field; proficiency in statistical modeling and coding.

job_postings.title: Global Health Research Fellow
job_postings.institution: East African Institute for Global Health
job_postings.description: Two-year fellowship focused on implementation science in infectious disease control.
job_postings.requirements: Graduate degree in public health or related field; field research experience preferred.

job_postings.title: Staff Scientist, Imaging Core Facility
job_postings.description: Manage advanced microscopy instruments and support user training and experiment design.
job_postings.requirements: PhD in a relevant field; significant hands-on experience with advanced imaging modalities.

job_postings.title: Summer Internship in Biotechnology R&D
job_postings.description: Three-month paid internship for advanced undergraduates and master’s students.
job_postings.requirements: Enrollment in a relevant degree program; basic lab experience.

job_postings.title: Postdoctoral Fellow in Structural Biology
job_postings.description: Study protein complexes using cryo-EM and integrative modeling approaches.
job_postings.requirements: PhD in structural biology, biophysics, or related field; experience with cryo-EM or X-ray crystallography.

journals.name: Journal of Integrative Biosciences
journals.description: The society’s flagship, peer-reviewed journal publishing research across biophysics, systems biology, and quantitative life sciences.

membership_plans.name: Early-Career Basic (No Journal Access)
membership_plans.description: Discounted membership for early-career researchers within 10 years of PhD, without bundled journal access.

membership_plans.name: Early-Career Standard
membership_plans.description: Standard early-career membership including online access to the flagship journal.

membership_plans.name: Early-Career Premium Plus
membership_plans.description: Enhanced early-career membership with online journal access and additional discounts on books and courses.
benefits: Conference abstract fee waivers (up to 1 per year)

membership_plans.name: Student Membership (Online Journal)
membership_plans.description: Membership for undergraduate and graduate students with full online journal access.

membership_plans.name: Student Membership (Basic)
membership_plans.description: Low-cost student membership without bundled journal access.

membership_plans.name: Regular Membership
membership_plans.description: Standard membership for established professionals with online journal access.

membership_plans.name: Regular Premium Membership
membership_plans.description: Premium membership with online journal access and enhanced event discounts.

membership_plans.name: Retired Membership
membership_plans.description: Discounted membership for retired professionals with optional journal access.
benefits: Eligibility to serve on select committees

membership_plans.name: Industry Affiliate
membership_plans.description: Membership for professionals in industry sectors aligned with the society’s mission.

membership_plans.name: Nonprofit / NGO Affiliate
membership_plans.description: Membership for staff of nonprofit organizations and NGOs.

membership_plans.name: Laboratory Technician Associate
membership_plans.description: Membership for laboratory technicians and research assistants.

membership_plans.name: Global South Early-Career Membership
membership_plans.description: Discounted early-career membership for members based in low- and middle-income countries, including online journal access.

research_grants.title: Early-Career Frontiers Research Grant 2026
research_grants.description: Flagship grant supporting ambitious, high-risk projects led by early-career investigators across all areas of quantitative biosciences.

research_grants.title: Machine Learning & Data Integration Grant 2026 (Early-Career)
research_grants.description: Supports early-career researchers applying machine learning to integrate multi-omic and clinical datasets.

research_grants.title: Early-Career Seed Grant 2026
research_grants.description: Seed funding for pilot projects that will support larger external grant applications.

research_grants.title: Mid-Career Innovation Award 2026
research_grants.description: Provides support for transformative projects led by mid-career investigators.

research_grants.title: Senior Investigator Excellence Prize 2026
research_grants.description: Honors a senior investigator for lifetime contributions; includes an unrestricted research grant.

research_grants.title: Student Travel Awards 2025
research_grants.description: Travel support for students presenting at the Annual Conference 2025.

research_grants.title: Global Collaboration Grant 2026
research_grants.description: Supports international collaborative projects at any career stage.

research_grants.title: Early-Career Climate Modeling Grant 2025
research_grants.description: Supports early-career investigators developing new climate prediction models.

research_grants.title: Data Science in Biology Fellowship 2026
research_grants.description: One-year fellowship program for postdoctoral researchers applying data science to biological questions.

research_grants.title: Student Microgrant Program 2026
research_grants.description: Small grants to support short research projects or thesis work for students.

resources.title: Core Laboratory Safety Practices: A Practical Guideline
resources.description: Comprehensive guideline covering fundamental lab safety practices for all research laboratories.

resources.title: Biosafety Level 2 Laboratory Safety Guideline
resources.description: Guideline for best practices in BSL-2 laboratories, including pathogen handling and waste disposal.

resources.title: Chemical Storage and Waste Management Checklist
resources.description: Checklist covering safe storage, labeling, and disposal of laboratory chemicals.

resources.title: Lab Safety Orientation Guide for New Staff
resources.description: Orientation guideline to help new lab members understand key safety policies and procedures.

resources.title: Fieldwork Safety Checklist for Biological Sampling
resources.description: Checklist for planning and conducting safe fieldwork involving biological sample collection.

resources.title: Climate-Resilient Laboratory Operations: Guideline for Research Facilities
resources.description: Guidance on preparing research laboratories for climate-related disruptions and extreme weather events.

resources.title: Research Data Management Toolkit
resources.description: Toolkit with templates and best practices for managing and sharing research data.

resources.title: Webinar: Reproducibility in Machine Learning for Biology
resources.description: Recorded webinar discussing best practices to improve reproducibility in machine learning workflows.

resources.title: Introduction to Quantitative Microscopy – Training Slides
resources.description: Slide deck for introductory training on quantitative image analysis in microscopy.

resources.title: Society Policy on Research Integrity
resources.description: Policy document outlining expectations and procedures related to research integrity.

resources.title: Case Study: Community Science Outreach Program
resources.description: Case study describing a successful community science outreach initiative.

resources.title: Infographic: Common Pipetting Errors and How to Avoid Them
resources.description: Visual guide highlighting common pipetting mistakes and simple corrections.

topics.label: Data analysis
topics.description: Statistical methods, bioinformatics workflows, and computational tools for analyzing scientific data.

topics.label: Microscopy
topics.description: Imaging technologies including light, electron, and super-resolution microscopy.

topics.label: Professional development
topics.description: Career skills, leadership, mentoring, and networking for scientists at all levels.

topics.label: Teaching
topics.description: Pedagogy, curriculum design, and classroom innovations in science education.

topics.label: Leadership
topics.description: Developing leadership skills for managing teams, labs, and organizations.

topics.label: Grant writing
topics.description: Strategies for preparing competitive grant proposals and securing research funding.

topics.label: Machine learning
topics.description: Applications of machine learning and AI to biological and biomedical research.

topics.label: Lab safety
topics.description: Best practices, regulations, and training materials for maintaining safe research environments.

topics.label: Career planning
topics.description: Long-term career strategy, job search skills, and transitions between sectors.

topics.label: Policy
topics.description: Science policy, advocacy, and the interface between research and decision-making.

conference_sessions.title: In-Person Workshop: Machine Learning for Climate Risk Assessment
conference_sessions.description: Hands-on workshop introducing machine learning workflows for assessing climate-related risks using observational and model data.

conference_sessions.title: In-Person Workshop: Deep Learning for Microscopy Images
conference_sessions.description: Practical tutorial on applying convolutional neural networks and segmentation models to quantitative microscopy datasets.

conference_sessions.title: In-Person Workshop: Machine Learning for Single-Cell Data
conference_sessions.description: Interactive workshop covering clustering, trajectory inference, and representation learning for single-cell omics.

conference_sessions.title: Advanced Machine Learning Masterclass (In-Person)
conference_sessions.description: Advanced topics in representation learning, causal inference, and uncertainty quantification for biological data.

conference_sessions.title: Virtual Workshop: Reproducible Machine Learning Pipelines
conference_sessions.description: Virtual workshop on best practices for building reproducible ML pipelines in computational biology.

conference_sessions.title: Plenary: Integrative Modeling of the Climate System
conference_sessions.description: Plenary lecture on advances in multi-scale modeling of the Earth system and implications for climate projections.

conference_sessions.title: Poster Session I: Systems Biology & Biophysics
conference_sessions.description: First poster session featuring work in systems biology, structural biology, and biophysics.

conference_sessions.title: Panel Discussion: Career Paths in Quantitative Life Sciences
conference_sessions.description: Panel featuring scientists from academia, industry, and government discussing diverse career trajectories.

conference_sessions.title: Tutorial: Introduction to Machine Learning for Biologists
conference_sessions.description: Foundational tutorial covering basic concepts and terminology for attendees new to machine learning.

conference_sessions.title: Early-Career Networking Reception
conference_sessions.description: Informal networking event for early-career researchers to meet peers and mentors.

conference_sessions.title: Hybrid Workshop: FAIR Data Sharing in Multicenter Studies
conference_sessions.description: Hybrid-format workshop exploring practical approaches to FAIR data management and sharing.

conference_sessions.title: Virtual Panel: Science of Climate Change and Policy Responses
conference_sessions.description: Interdisciplinary panel discussing how climate science informs policy decisions worldwide.

conference_sessions.title: Poster Session II: Climate, Environment & Global Health
conference_sessions.description: Poster session featuring research on climate impacts, environmental health, and global health initiatives.

journal_articles.title: Machine-Learned Projections of Urban Heat Under Future Climate Scenarios
journal_articles.abstract: We develop a machine learning framework to project urban heat islands under multiple climate change scenarios, integrating remote sensing and socio-demographic data.

journal_articles.title: Attribution of Compound Climate Extremes Using Interpretable Machine Learning
journal_articles.abstract: This study applies interpretable machine learning methods to attribute compound heat and drought extremes to anthropogenic climate change.

journal_articles.title: Emergent Constraints on Ocean Carbon Uptake Under Climate Change
journal_articles.abstract: Using an ensemble of Earth system models, we derive emergent constraints on future ocean carbon uptake and quantify associated uncertainties.

journal_articles.title: Climate Change and Vector-Borne Disease Dynamics in Urban Environments
journal_articles.abstract: We investigate how projected climate change will alter the transmission dynamics of mosquito-borne diseases in rapidly growing cities.

journal_articles.title: Cryosphere Feedbacks in a Warming Climate: An Integrative Modeling Study
journal_articles.abstract: We analyze ice sheet, sea ice, and snow cover feedbacks using a hierarchy of climate models.

journal_articles.title: Early-Warning Indicators of Climate Tipping Points in Complex Networks
journal_articles.abstract: We extend early-warning indicators to spatially extended climate networks to detect tipping elements.

journal_articles.title: Self-Supervised Representation Learning for Single-Cell Transcriptomics
journal_articles.abstract: We present a self-supervised learning framework for deriving robust embeddings from single-cell RNA-seq data.

journal_articles.title: Structural Basis of Ion Channel Gating in Variable Membrane Potentials
journal_articles.abstract: A combined cryo-EM and molecular dynamics study of ion channel gating under different voltage conditions.

journal_articles.title: Super-Resolution Microscopy of Dynamic Cytoskeletal Assemblies
journal_articles.abstract: We apply live-cell super-resolution microscopy to study cytoskeletal remodeling in response to mechanical stress.

journal_articles.title: Implementing FAIR Data Standards in Multicenter Clinical Studies
journal_articles.abstract: We describe a framework for harmonizing data collection and metadata standards across multicenter clinical consortia.

journal_articles.title: Structured Mentoring Programs Improve Early-Career Research Outcomes
journal_articles.abstract: A mixed-methods evaluation of structured mentoring initiatives in a scientific society.

journal_articles.title: Ecological Network Responses to Gradual Climate Change
journal_articles.abstract: We analyze how gradual warming reshapes species interaction networks using long-term ecological data.

products.name: Introduction to Bioinformatics: Concepts and Practice
products.description: A comprehensive introductory textbook covering core bioinformatics algorithms, databases, and practical analysis workflows.

products.name: Practical Bioinformatics Workflows for Genomics
products.description: Step-by-step guide to designing, running, and troubleshooting bioinformatics pipelines for next-generation sequencing data.

products.name: Advanced Bioinformatics Algorithms
products.description: In-depth treatment of graph algorithms, probabilistic models, and machine learning techniques for complex biological data.

products.name: Laboratory Safety Best Practices
products.description: Practical guide to implementing a culture of safety in academic and industry research laboratories.

products.name: Quantitative Microscopy in Cell Biology
products.description: Comprehensive resource on quantitative imaging, image analysis, and experimental design in modern microscopy.

products.name: Machine Learning for the Life Sciences
products.description: Introductory text on applying machine learning models to genomics, imaging, and clinical data.

products.name: Climate Change Impacts on Global Health (eBook)
products.description: eBook summarizing current understanding of climate change impacts on population health and health systems.

products.name: Society Logo T-Shirt (Navy)
products.description: Unisex navy t-shirt featuring the Society for Integrative Biosciences logo.

products.name: Laboratory Coffee Mug
products.description: Ceramic mug with laboratory glassware illustrations.

products.name: Lab Safety Training Slide Deck (Download)
products.description: Downloadable slide deck for conducting lab safety training sessions in academic labs.

products.name: Machine Learning Tutorial Notebooks (Download)
products.description: Jupyter notebook collection demonstrating core ML techniques on biological datasets.

products.name: Conference Notebook
products.description: A5 notebook with dotted pages and the society logo embossed on the cover.

products.name: Professional Development for Scientists
products.description: Guidebook covering communication, leadership, and career planning for scientists.

products.name: Grant Writing in the Life Sciences
products.description: Practical strategies and annotated examples for successful grant applications.
